declared_alphabet.note: The shipped set's declared alphabet is ASCII English plus deliberate program strings. Content outside it reds: a stray script (the Cyrillic arm) or a personal name. The out-of-alphabet personal names are declared here as DATA (ROADMAP 417), so the detector's own code names no person and covering a collaborator is one line here, not a code edit.

cyrillic_waivers.note: deliberate program string — the universal chat law names the Russian banned frame it forbids, the detector-vocabulary self-exclusion class (kin of the sync-mirrors name_waiver)

name_waivers.note: authorship byline — the copyright/attribution line the license names, not a requirement statement
detector vocabulary — the mirror-README language scan (check_mirror_language) names the token it refuses, the engine's own self-exclusion class
